findings: BUG-1 TryUnescape: single-char quote -> IndexOf(char,1,-1) throws.
BUG-2 TryUnescape: single-char double-quote -> input[1..^1] range exception.
BUG-3 SplitCommandLine: unclosed quote discards all input.
BUG-4 SplitCommandLine: adjacent quoted strings emit 2 tokens not 1.
BUG-5 ParseOptionAndSeparators: empty option name not rejected.
OQ-1 ValidateOptionsArgumentArity: absent required options not caught.
OQ-2 ValidateOptionsArgumentArity: KeyNotFoundException if called before ValidateNoUnknownOptions.
OQ-4 ValidateOptionsArgumentArity: grammar defect (at least 1 arguments).
OQ-IsVersionCompatible-1: null guard missing on supportedProtocolVersions (NullReferenceException latent defect).
OQ-IsVersionCompatible-4: no unit tests for IsVersionCompatible.
